description:
A drone fleet manager needs to register a new firmware release in the Aerobridge system before deploying it across the fleet. Register a new firmware record in the Aerobridge Django admin panel (http://localhost:8000/admin/) with the following details:

- Binary file url: https://firmware.dronecorp-avionics.example.com/releases/stable/v4.3.7/autopilot-stable-v4.3.7.bin
- Binary file hash: 3a7bd3e2360a3d29eea436fcfb7e44c735d117c42d1c1835420b6b9942dd4f1b
- Version: 4.3.7
- Manufacturer: DroneCorp Avionics
- Friendly name: AutoPilot Stable Release v4.3.7
- Is active: True

The admin panel is already open in Firefox. Admin credentials: username 'admin', password 'adminpass123'.
